collectible.name: German M35 Steel Helmet
collectible.description:
Original World War II German M35 Stahlhelm (steel helmet) in excellent condition. This helmet features the classic Germanic design with rolled edge and original field grey paint finish. The interior retains its original leather liner and aluminum liner band. Chinstrap is complete with original buckle.
Markings visible inside include the manufacturer's stamp and lot number. This example shows typical wartime wear consistent with field use.
